recapPrompt.prompt: Which clue is the strongest sign that a stack might help?

choices.label: The most recent unfinished item matters most
choices.feedback: Correct. That is one of the clearest stack clues.

choices.label: The middle item matters most
choices.feedback: Not this one. Middle-based thinking points more toward patterns like binary search.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain how matching symbols and undo history both fit the stack idea.
